question: [File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/service/NftAllowanceServiceImpl.java -> Scope: Medium: Shutdown of greater than or equal to 30% of network processing nodes without brute force actions, but does not shut down the network'] [Function: getNftAllowances()] Can an unprivileged external user send requests with an EntityIdAliasParameter containing a very long alias string, causing entityService.lookup() to execute a database query with a large parameter value that causes excessive memory allocation in the database query planner, degrading database performance across 30%+ of mirror node processing nodes?
